version_description: Acoustic campfire version. Should be able to play along the original version.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I REMEMBER YOU            -      Skid Row

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Woke up to the sound of pouring rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 The wind would whisper and I'd think of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 And all the tears you cried, that called my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
 And when you needed me I came through[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 I paint a picture of the days gone by[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 When love went blind and you would make me see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 I'd stare a lifetime into your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
 So that I knew that you were there for me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
 Time after time you were there for me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Remember yesterday, walking hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 Love letters in the sand, I remember you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
 Through the sleepless nights, through every endless day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 I'd wanna hear you say, I remembe..er you (ooh-oouh ooh ooh-oouh)[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 We spend the summer with the top rolled down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Wished ever after would be like this[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 You said I love you babe, without a sound[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 I said I'd give my life for just one kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
 I'd live for your smile and die for your kiss[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Remember yesterday, walking hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 Love letters in the sand, I remember you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
 Through the sleepless nights, through every endless day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
 I'd wanna hear you say, I remember you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 We've had our share of hard times[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
 But that's the price we paid[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
 And through it all we kept the promise that we made[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dsus[/ch]                 ([ch]G[/ch])
 I swear you'll never be lonely[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Woke up to the sound of pouring rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Washed away a dream of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 But nothing else could ever take you away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
 Cause you'll always be my dream come true[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]      
 Oh my darling, I love you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Remember yesterday, walking hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 Love letters in the sand, I remember you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
 Through the sleepless nights, through every endless day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 I'd wanna hear you say, I remember you[/tab]

[Outro-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Remember yesterday, walking hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 Love letters in the sand, I remember you[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
 Through all the sleepless nights, through every endless day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
 I'd wanna hear you say, I remember, I remember you[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
yeah  oh oh yeah[/tab]

[tab][Final Arpeggio]
  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] 
e|-----3----|-----0----|-----3----|------3/5\3-------|--3--|
B|------3---|---3--3---|------3---|---3--3/5\3-1/3\1-|--3--|
G|---0---0--|----0--0--|---0---0--|----0-------2/4\2-|--0--|
D|----0---0-|--2-----2-|----0---0-|--2---------------|--0--|
A|--2-------|-3--------|--2-------|-3----------------|--2--|
E|-3--------|----------|-3--------|------------------|--3--|[/tab]
